steps.title: Translate the phrase into an inequality
steps.content:
The problem states "x is at least twice the value of y." This translates to the inequality: $$x \geq 2y$$\
Since y = 51, substitute into the inequality.

steps.title: Substitute the value y = 51
steps.content:
Replace y with 51 in the inequality: $$x \geq 2 \cdot 51$$
Simplify the right-hand side.

steps.title: Calculate the result
steps.content:
Compute 2 * 51: $$2 \cdot 51 = 102$$
The inequality becomes $$x \geq 102$$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
